mapper.sql: id, user_id, transaction_number, partner_number, amount, payment_address, receiving_address, payment_status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, is_deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_payment_record(user_id, transaction_number, partner_number, amount, receiving_address) VALUES(#{userId}, #{transactionNumber}, #{partnerNumber}, #{amount}, #{receivingAddress})
mapper.select:
select
from t_payment_record where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
